design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate side-scrolling levels, defeat enemies and bosses, rescue girlfriend across themed worlds
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Form transformation mechanic: revert to monkey form on first hit, lose life on second hit—risk/reward of pushing forward
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Play as Congo, a half-human half-monkey hybrid, traversing exotic worlds (jungle, mountain, pirate ship, volcano, ghost town) to rescue a kidnapped girlfriend
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Embraces absurdist fantasy premise (caveman with monkey transformation) and tonal variety across 35 distinct levels; positions itself as spiritual sequel without direct narrative continuity

difficulty.lives_system: Health-based with form degradation: normal form → monkey form (hit once) → death (hit twice)
difficulty.checkpointing: Password feature enables non-linear progression and save states mid-game
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Password system allows skipping difficult sections; form transformation provides forgiving damage model compared to instant-death mechanics

progression.unlock_mechanism: 35 sequential levels across 5 themed worlds (jungle, mountain, pirate ship, volcano, ghost town); hidden level select available
replayability_hooks: Varied level themes and boss encounters across worlds
Hidden level select for non-linear replay

world_building_techniques: Themed world progression telegraphs narrative beats (tropical → mountainous → nautical → volcanic → spectral)
Boss roster reflects world themes (T-Rex in mountain, pirate in ship, mad scientist in unclear context, vampire in ghost town)
Character design (Congo's form) serves as visual storytelling of hybrid nature

boss_design.philosophy: Thematic boss roster reflecting world settings; progression from grounded creatures to supernatural entities (demon final boss)

faction_indicators: Supernatural opposition (demon, vampire) vs. mundane antagonists (pirate, ninja)
Colonizer-coded narrative: rescue of feminine figure by masculine explorer across exoticized worlds
danger_signals: Female character reduced to kidnapped damsel archetype
Exoticized world progression reinforces adventure-game power fantasy
Supernatural enemies (demon, vampire) positioned as evil obstacles
environmental_storytelling: Volcano: dangerous natural hazard as level environment
Ghost town: abandoned, haunted space inhabited by supernatural foes

sources_used: tcrf (The Cutting Room Floor) - Congo's Caper article
